ddls:
CREATE TABLE "network_traffic" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network traffic entry */,
  "bidirectional_packets" INTEGER /* Number of bidirectional packets in the network traffic */,
  "bidirectional_bytes" INTEGER /* Number of bidirectional bytes in the network traffic */,
  "application_name" TEXT /* Name of the application generating the network traffic */,
  "application_category_name" TEXT /* Category of the application generating the network traffic */,
  "application_is_guessed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the application was guessed */,
  "application_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the guessed application */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the network traffic entry */,
  "source_ip" TEXT /* Source IP address of the network traffic */,
  "destination_ip" TEXT /* Destination IP address of the network traffic */,
  "source_port" INTEGER /* Source port of the network traffic */,
  "destination_port" INTEGER /* Destination port of the network traffic */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Network protocol of the traffic (e.g., TCP, UDP) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the network traffic */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the traffic is linked to (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_traffic_application_name FOREIGN KEY ("application_name") REFERENCES applications ("application_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_traffic_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "application_name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "application_category_name" TEXT /* Category of the application */,
  "network_signature" TEXT /* Network signature of the application */,
  "application_version" TEXT /* Version of the application */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Last update date of the application */,
  "developer" TEXT /* Developer or company of the application */,
  "license" TEXT /* License type of the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_application_category_name FOREIGN KEY ("application_category_name") REFERENCES application_categories ("category_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (if applicable) */,
  "category_priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the category for display */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_signatures" (
  "signature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network signature */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application the signature belongs to */,
  "signature_value" TEXT /* Value of the network signature */,
  "signature_type" TEXT /* Type of the network signature (e.g., protocol, payload) */,
  "signature_version" TEXT /* Version of the network signature */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Last update date of the network signature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_signatures_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guessed_applications" (
  "guessed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guessed application */,
  "network_traffic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network traffic entry the guessed application belongs to */,
  "application_name" TEXT /* Name of the guessed application */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the guessed application */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine learning model used for the guess */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the application guess */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the guess (e.g., pattern match, heuristic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guessed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_guessed_applications_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_guessed_applications_network_traffic_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_traffic_id") REFERENCES network_traffic ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine learning model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the machine learning model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the machine learning model */,
  "last_trained" TEXT /* Last training date of the model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the machine learning model */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_trainings" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training data entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine learning model the training data belongs to */,
  "training_data" TEXT /* Training data for the machine learning model */,
  "training_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the training */,
  "training_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the training */,
  "training_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the training */,
  "training_loss" REAL /* Loss of the training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, security expert) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "permission_level" INTEGER /* Priority of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_traffic_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report entry */,
  "network_traffic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network traffic entry the report belongs to */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data for the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_traffic_reports_network_traffic_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_traffic_id") REFERENCES network_traffic ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_traffic_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert entry */,
  "network_traffic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network traffic entry the alert belongs to */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message for the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., security, performance) */,
  "alert_severity" INTEGER /* Severity level of the alert */,
  "alert_resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the alert has been resolved */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Time the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_network_traffic_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_traffic_id") REFERENCES network_traffic ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration entry */,
  "tool_name" TEXT /* Name of the network monitoring tool */,
  "integration_data" TEXT /* Data for the integration */,
  "integration_type" TEXT /* Type of the integration (e.g., API, webhook) */,
  "last_sync_time" TEXT /* Last synchronization time */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the integration (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard entry */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_data" TEXT /* Data for the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_type" TEXT /* Type of the dashboard (e.g., real-time, historical) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dashboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization entry */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dashboard the visualization belongs to */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Data for the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of the visualization (e.g., chart, graph) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_dashboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("dashboard_id") REFERENCES dashboards ("dashboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the log belongs to */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message for the log */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of the action (e.g., login, report generation) */,
  "action_time" TEXT /* Time the action was performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the action (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
